sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Dawn un Jesuh’ min vangliatna, Vantung mite bok un,
Kumpi Lukhu hong la un la, Kumpi lian

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kumpi lukhu hong tan Topa khu sak

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: in, Jesuh lian bel sak un,
Liatna khempeuh ama aa ci’n, Kumpi lian bel pia

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ama mi siang honpite tawh, A khe mai-ah bok un,
Phat khawm tawntung ni amau tawh,
